rulings.Case Title: SUSAN JEFFRIES-FITZGERALD VS. REN VOLPE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Relief From Demurrers And Order To Strike
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, June 23, 2017, line 4. PLAINTIFF SUSAN JEFFRIES-FITZGERALD'S Motion For Relief From Demurrers And Order To Strike. DENIED. Movng party fails to provide any evidence upon which the Court could determine that Demurrer/Motion to Strike orders were taken against it through moving party's mistake, inadvertence, surprise, or excusable neglect. E.g. See Shapiro v. Clark (2008) 164 Cal.App.4th 1128 "In support of the motion, appellant submitted a declaration setting forth the facts of her son's death and other matters impeding her response to the complaint." =(501/REQ)
